title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v HATEGEKIMANA
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v HATEGEKIMANA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE - RPAA 00389/2024/CA (Gakwaya, P.J.) 30 Ukuboza
2025]
Amategeko agenga ibimenyetso – Ibimenyetso mu manza nshinjabyaha – Imvugo z’uregwa – Kuba
uregwa yagera imbere y’Urukiko agahindura imvugo, agahakana icyaha yari yaremeye mu nzego
z’iperereza, ntibivuze ko ibyo avugira mu Rukiko agihakana ari byo bigomba kwemerwa, ahubwo
Umucamanza afite ubushobozi bwo gushishoza no gusesengura akoresheje umutimanama we,
agaciro aha iryo hinduramvugo.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Uru rubanza rwatangiriye mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Nyarugenge,
Ubushinjacyaha bukurikiranye Hategekimana ku cyaha cy’ ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo
gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi nyuma yuko afashwe n’abanyerondo afite
udupfunyika ibihumbi bibiri (2.000) tw’urumogi, yari yakuye i Musanze aruhawe n’umugore
witwa Uwimpuhwe ngo aruzanire uwitwa Hassan ubarizwa i Kigali (Kimisagara), byarangira
akishyurwa 70.000 Frw, ariko arumugejejeho Hassan n’uwo mugore ntibumvikana ku giciro cya
300.000 Frw bari bemeranyije mbere, bituma Hategekimana arusubizayo, ari nabwo yafatirwaga
mu cyuho ari mu nzira yerekeza Nyabugogo agiye gutega imodoka imusubiza i Musanze. Urwo
Rukiko rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko ahamwa n’ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza
urumogi, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda
miliyoni makumyabiri (20.000.000 Frw).
Hategekimana yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru ahakana icyaha, avuga ko ibisobanuro bye bitahawe
agaciro, ariko mu iburanisha avuga ko yemera icyaha kandi agisabira imbabazi, asaba
kugabanyirizwa igihano. Urwo Rukiko narwo rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko kuba Hategekimana
yaraburanye yemera icyaha bwa mbere ku rwego rw’ubujurire, ntacyo byamumarira kuko
bidashobora kumubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha.
Yarongeye arajurira noneho mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko anenga Urukiko Rukuru kuba
rwaramuhamije ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi kandi nta mugambi n’ubushake
yari afite byo kugikora, kuko uwamutumye akamuha icyo gikapu yari yamubwiye ko ari imyenda
irimo, ko atari azi ko harimo urumogi, ko ndetse uwo bivugwa ko yari aruzaniye atigeze afatwa
ngo amushinje.
Ubushinjacyaha bwo buvuga ko kuba Hategekimana yaremeye icyaha kuva na mbere mu
Bugenzacyaha akaba ahinduye imvugo nyuma, bidatesha agaciro uko kwemera icyaha kwe mu
iperereza, hashingiwe ku murongo3 wafashwe mu manza zitandukanye.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Kuba uregwa yagera imbere y’Urukiko agahindura imvugo, agahakana
icyaha yari yaremeye mu nzego z’iperereza, ntibivuze ko ibyo avugira mu Rukiko agihakana ari
byo bigomba kwemerwa, ahubwo Umucamanza afite ubushobozi bwo gushishoza no gusesengura
akoresheje umutimanama we, agaciro aha iryo hinduramvugo.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Imanza zifashishijwe:

Ubushinjacyaha vs Sgt. Ntaganira n’abandi, RPA 0010/06/CS-RPA 0011/06/CS-RPA
0012/06/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 18/7/2008.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Nsanzamahoro, RPAA 00319/2022/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku
wa 17/11/2023.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku wa 20/2/2021, Hategekimana Daniel yafashwe n’abanyerondo ari mu Mudugudu
w’Ubumwe, Akagari ka Kabahizi, Umurenge wa Gitega, Akarere ka Nyarugenge, mu Mujyi wa
Kigali ahitwa kuri Maison des Jeunes, afite udupfunyika ibihumbi bibiri (2.000) tw’urumogi, yari
yakuye i Musanze aruhawe n’umugore witwa Uwimpuhwe Agnès ngo aruzanire Hassan ukoresha
nomero ya telefone 0783318988, ubarizwa i Kigali (Kimisagara), byarangira akishyurwa 70.000
Frw, ariko arumugejejeho Hassan n’uwo mugore ntibumvikana ku giciro cya 300.000 Frw bari
bemeranyije mbere, bituma Hategekimana Daniel arusubizayo, ari nabwo yafatirwaga mu cyuho
ari mu nzira ahantu havuzwe, yerekeza Nyabugogo agiye gutega imodoka imusubiza i Musanze.
[2] Iperereza rirangiye, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Hategekimana Daniel mu Rukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Nyarugenge ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu
bwoko bw’urumogi, busaba ko cyamuhama agahanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni makumyabiri (20.000.000 Frw).
[3] Hategekimana Daniel yaburanye ahakana icyaha, avuga ko uwamutumye yamuhaye
igikapu amubwira ko ari imyenda, ko we atari azi ko harimo urumogi.
[4] Mu rubanza no RP 00348/2021/TGI/Nyge rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa
Nyarugenge ku wa 22/7/2021, rushingiye ku kuba Hategekimana Daniel yarafashwe afite
udupfunyika 2.000 tw’urumogi mu gikapu nk’uko bigaragazwa n’inyandikomvugo y’ifatira
yashyizeho umukono, ku mvugo z’abatangabuhamya b’abanyerondo aribo Murindwa Protogène
na Ntaganzwa Kamegeri, rwemeje ko ahamwa n’ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza
urumogi, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda
miliyoni makumyabiri (20.000.000 Frw).
[5] Hategekimana Daniel yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru ahakana icyaha, avuga ko ibisobanuro
bye bitahawe agaciro, ariko mu iburanisha avuga ko yemera icyaha kandi agisabira imbabazi,
asaba kugabanyirizwa igihano.
[6] Mu rubanza no RPA 01367/2021/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, ku wa 14/3/2025,
rwemeje ko kuba Hategekimana Daniel yaraburanye yemera icyaha bwa mbere ku rwego
rw’ubujurire, ntacyo byamumarira kuko bidashobora kumubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha,
nk’uko byafashweho umurongo1 n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire. Rwemeza kandi ko nta makosa Urukiko
1 Mu rubanza n° RPAA 00589/2021/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 24/2/2023, haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Hitayezu Sylvain (igika cya 17), uvuga ko kwemera icyaha bwa mbere mu bujurire, bitagirira
akamaro uregwa kuko ujurira aba azanye ingingo nshya ataburanishije mu nkiko zibanza kandi umucamanza
w’ubujurire afite gusa inshingano yo gukosora amakosa yaba yarakozwe n’izo nkiko.

rwabanje rwakoze rumuhamya ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi, kuko urwo
yafatanywe yari yiteguye kuruha uwo ariwe wese ukeneye kurugura nk’uko na none byemejwe
mu rubanza nº RPAA 00436/2020/CA2 rwaciwe n’uru Rukiko ku wa 28/6/2022, haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Ahimpereye Ndeze François, ko ariko urubanza yajuririye ruhindutse ku
birebana n’igihano, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya 10.000.000 Frw.
[7] Ku wa 2/4/2025, Hategekimana Daniel yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko anenga
Urukiko Rukuru kuba rwaramuhamije ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi kandi
nta mugambi n’ubushake yari afite byo kugikora, kuko uwamutumye akamuha icyo gikapu yari
yamubwiye ko ari imyenda irimo, ko atari azi ko harimo urumogi, ko ndetse uwo bivugwa ko yari
aruzaniye atigeze afatwa ngo amushinje, ko ariko urwo Rukiko rwirengagije ko yaruhawe atabizi,
ko rero asaba uru Rukiko gushingira ku ngingo ya 83 y’Itegeko riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano,
iteganya ko ukora icyaha abishaka ariwe uhanwa, rugakosora iyo nenge. Avuga kandi ko urwo
Rukiko rwirengagije ko nta bimenyetso by’icyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi byagaragajwe, ko
ahubwo rwari kumuhanira icyo kuba yaragize umwete muke wo kutabanza kureba neza ibyo
atwaye bigatuma afatanwa urumogi, akaba aribyo yari akwiye guhanirwa.
[8] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko kuba Hategekimana Daniel yaremeye icyaha kuva na mbere
mu Bugenzacyaha akaba ahinduye imvugo nyuma, bidatesha agaciro uko kwemera icyaha kwe
mu iperereza, hashingiwe ku murongo3 wafashwe mu manza zitandukanye uvuga ko guhakana
icyaha umuburanyi yemeye mu iperereza ubwabyo bidatesha ukwemera kwe agaciro, kuko
Umucamanza afite ububasha bwo gusuzumana ubushishozi no guha agaciro izo mvugo z’uregwa
wemeye icyaha harebwe ibikorwa aregwa, igihe asanga uko kwemera kudashidikanywaho akabiha
agaciro ashingiye ku mutimanama we (intime conviction), ko busaba uru Rukiko kwemeza ko
urubanza rujuririrwa rugumana agaciro karwo.
[9] Urubanza rwahawe no RPAA 00389/2024/CA, ruburanishwa ku wa 16/12/2025,
Hategekimana Daniel yunganiwe na Me Ruberwa N. Silas, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na
Bunyoye Grâce, Umushinjacyaha ku rwego rw’Igihugu.
[10] Harebwe imyanzuro n’imiburanire y’ababuranyi, ikibazo kigomba gusumwa kikaba ari
ukumenya niba Urukiko Rukuru rwarakoze amakosa yo guhamya Hategekimana Daniel icyaha
cy’ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi, kandi urwo yafatanywe arutwaye atari azi
ko arirwo.
II. IKIBAZO KIGIZE URUBANZA N’ISUZUMWA RYACYO
Kumenya niba Urukiko Rukuru rwarakoze amakosa yo guhamya
Hategekimana Daniel icyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi ataragikoze
2 Muri urwo rubanza hemejwe ko (Igika cya 19) aha hakaba haremejwe ko: «Umuntu ntagirwa umucuruzi
w’ibiyobyabwenge no kuba hari abaguzi babonetse aho acururiza, ahubwo igihe cyose afite ibicuruzwa kandi yiteguye
kubiha umuntu wese umugana ashaka ibyo agurisha, aba ari umucuruzi w’ibiyobyabwenge».
3 Urubanza n° RPAA 00480/2023/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/2/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha
na Twizeyimana Jean de Dieu (igika cya 18).

[11] Hategekimana Daniel avuga ko Urukiko Rukuru rwakoze amakosa yo kumuhamya
ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi kandi igikapu rwarimo yafatanywe yaragihawe
n’uwitwa Uwimpuhwe Agnès amubwira ko ari imyenda irimo, amutuma i Kigali ngo ayizanire
Hassan, ko rero ibyo bigaragaza ko nta mugambi n’ubushake yari afite byo gukora icyaha
yahamijwe, kuko atari azi ko atwaye urumogi, ko ahubwo nawe yarubonye ari uko afashwe, ko
uretse n’ibyo mu kumuhamya icyo cyaha, urwo Rukiko nta kimenyetso gifatika rwabishingiyeho
kubera ko n’uwo bivugwa ko yari aruzaniye atigeze afatwa ngo amushinje, akaba asaba uru Rukiko
gushingira ku ngingo ya 83 y’Itegeko riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano, iteganya ko ukora icyaha
abishaka ariwe uhanwa, rugakosora iyo nenge. Asaba kandi ko uru Rukiko rubibonye ukundi
yahanirwa icyaha cyo gufatanwa urumogi aho kuba icyo kurucuruza, kuko yemera ko yagize
uburangare bwo kutabanza kureba neza ibyo atwaye bigatuma atwara urumogi atabizi.
[12] Me Ruberwa N. Silas, wunganira Hategekimana Daniel, avuga ko Urukiko Rukuru
rwavuze ko Ubushinjacyaha bwatanze ibimenyetso bimushinja icyaha rwamuhamije cyo gucuruza
urumogi, nyamara ntirwabigaragaza. Avuga kandi ko uwo yunganira yahakanye ko adacuruza
urumogi kuko nta muguzi cyangwa amafaranga bamufatanye, ahubwo ko yaruhawe na
UWIMPUHWE Agnès ariwe nyirarwo, ngo arushyire Hassan bapfa ibiciro. Avuga ko rero
ashingiye ku murongo watanzwe mu rubanza n° RPAA 00436/2020/CA4 rwaciwe n’uru Rukiko
ku wa 28/6/2022 rw’Ubushinjacyaha na Ahimpereye Ndezi François, basaba uru Rukiko
gucukumbura rukareba niba yari akwiye guhamwa n’icyo cyaha.
[13] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko ibivugwa na Hategekimana Daniel by’uko atari azi ko mu
gikapu yari atwaye harimo urumogi nta shingiro byahabwa, kuko abazwa mu Bugenzacyaha no
mu Bushinjacyaha hose yemeye icyaha, ndetse asobanura uburyo yavanye urumogi i Musanze
abizi neza ko arirwo azaniye uwitwa Hassan wari muri Kigali, ahabwa itike ya 10.000 Frw, ko
rero kuvuga ko Urukiko Rukuru rutagombaga kumuhamya ubufatanyacyaha mu gucuruza
urumogi kuko hari uwari warumuhaye ari nawe nyirarwo, ngo bikaba byumvikanisha ko rutari
urwe nta shingiro bifite kuko ahubwo bigaragaza ko ahamwa n’icyaha cy’ubufatanyacyaha mu
kurucuruza kuko ariwe waruhawe akaruzanira umuguzi nk’uko yabyiyemereye kandi ku
mafaranga arukomokaho akaba yari guhembwamo 70.000 Frw nk’uko yabisobanuye mu ibazwa
rye aho yanavuze ko ibyo yabitewe n’ibibazo yari afite byo kuba umugore we yari mu bitaro, nyina
umubyara akaba ari impumyi, ubwo rero akaba ariwe ugomba kubashakira icyo kurya bose, ko
kuba ahinduye imvugo nyuma nta gaciro byahabwa.
[14] Ku bijyanye n’ibivugwa n’umwunganizi wa Hategekimana Daniel by’uko ko ngo nta
mugambi yigeze agira wo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge, abikura i Musanze abijyana Kimisagara,
Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko ibyo avuga bitandukanye n’uko dosiye iteye, kuko mu ibazwa rye mu
Bugenzacyaha yavuze ko yahawe amafaranga 10.000 bya ticket, naho ibyo gusubiza urumogi
Musanze avuga ko byatewe n’uko Hassan yananiwe kumvikana na Uwimpuhwe Agnès ku kiguzi
cy’urwo rumogi, ko rero busaba uru Rukiko kwemeza ko urubanza rujuririrwa rugumanye agaciro
karwo.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
4 Umuntu ntagirwa umucuruzi w’ibiyobyabwenge no kuba hari abaguzi babonetse aho acururiza, ahubwo igihe cyose
afite ibicuruzwa kandi yiteguye kubiha umuntu wese umugana ashaka ibyo agurisha, aba ari umucuruzi
bw’ibiyobyabwenge.

[15] Impaka muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba Urukiko Rukuru rwarakoze amakosa
yo guhamya Hategekimana Daniel ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi kandi
ataramenye ko ibyo yatumwe kuzana i Kigali mu gikapu yafatanywe, byari urumogi.
[16] Nk’uko byemejwe mu rubanza no RPA 0010/06/CS-RPA 0011/06/CS-RPA 0012/06/CS
rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 18/7/2008, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Sgt. Ntaganira
Eugène na bagenzi be, kuba uregwa yagera imbere y’Urukiko agahindura imvugo, agahakana
icyaha yari yaremeye mu nzego z’iperereza, ntibivuze ko ibyo avugira mu Rukiko agihakana ari
byo bigomba kwemerwa, ahubwo Umucamanza afite ubushobozi bwo gushishoza no gusesengura
akoresheje umutimanama we, agaciro aha iryo hinduramvugo; uwo murongo kandi wongeye
gushingirwaho mu manza zitandukanye zaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire nk’urubanza nº RPAA
00319/2022/CA rwo ku wa 17/11/2023, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Nsanzamahoro Dominique.
[17] Nk’uko bigaragara mu gace ka 8, aka 10, aka 20 n’aka 31 tw’urubanza rujuririrwa, Urukiko
Rukuru rwasobanuye ko kuba Hategekimana Daniel yaraburanye yemera icyaha bwa mbere ku
rwego rw’ubujurire, atari inenge yasuzumwa ngo ibe yakosorwa n’Umucamanza wo kuri urwo
rwego kuko atabiburanishije ku rwego rwa mbere, rugaragaza ko ntacyo byamumarira kuko
bidashobora kumubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, nk’uko byafashweho umurongo5 n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire; ko ahubwo kuba yarafashwe afite urumogi bivuye ku makuru abashinzwe
umutekano bari bahawe ko arucuruza, kuba yarafashwe yiteguye kurugurisha uwamugana
arukeneye, kuba hari abatangabuhamya Murindwa Protogène na Ntaganzwa Kamegeri bamwe mu
bamufashe bamushinja, rwemeje ko nta makosa Urukiko rwabanje rwakoze rumuhamya
ubufatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi, ko ariko kuba ari ubwa mbere akurikiranyweho
icyaha mu buryo buzwi, bikwiye kumubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha ituma agabanyirizwa
igihano, maze rushingiye ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya
ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, nk’uko yahinduwe n’iya 26 (a) y’Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa
4/12/2023, rutanirengagije uburemere n’ingaruka z’icyaha yakoze cyangiza ubuzima bwa benshi,
rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni
icumi (10.000.000 Frw).
[18] Nk’uko bigaragara Hategekimana Daniel abazwa mu Bugenzacyaha yavuze ko urumogi
yafatanywe yarutwaye abitewe n’ubukene, akaba yari arukuye muri gare ya Musanze, aruhawe
n’umunyeshuri witwa Nyinawumuntu Ange nawe wari utumwe n’umu maman atazi amazina
bamenyaniye mu kabare basangira urwagwa, amubwira ko ashaka kumuha akazi gashyushye ko
kumujyanira urumogi i Kigali, ku Kimisagara muri bar ya Hassan, bakomeza kuvugana kuri
telefone ariko agakoresha numero nyinshi zitandukanye, uwo mwana warumuzaniye muri gare
amuha na ticket ya 10.000 Frw na numero ya telefone 0783318988 ya Hassan yagombaga kuza
bavugana, ariko ko ageze aho yagombaga kurujyana Hassan n’uwo mudamu bananiwe kumvikana
ku giciro cy’urumogi cya 300.000 Frw bari bemeranyijweho mbere y’uko ahaguruka i Musanze,
ko kandi we (Daniel) yagombaga kwishyurwa 70.000 Frw, ubwo bwumvikane buke bukaba
5 Mu rubanza n° RPAA 00589/2021/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 24/2/2023, haburana Ubushinjacyaha
na Hitayezu Sylvain (igika cya 17), uvuga ko kwemera icyaha bwa mbere mu bujurire, bitagirira akamaro uregwa
kuko ujurira aba azanye ingingo nshya ataburanishije mu Nkiko zibanza kandi Umucamanza w’ubujurire afite gusa
inshingano yo gukosora amakosa yaba yarakozwe n’izo nkiko.
6 Iteganya ko: “Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano cy’igifungo cya
burundu ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, naho ihazabu ikaba ishobora kugabanywa kugeza
kuri ¼ y’ihazabu ntoya iteganywa n’itegeko”

aribwo bwatumye ajya Nyabugogo ashaka gusubira i Musanze, Hassan ahita amutanga, afatirwa
ku gasoko ko mu Cyahafi. Yavuze ko ari ubwa mbere yari akoze ubucuruzi bw’urumogi, ko ariko
yabitewe n’ubukene kuko umugore we yari mu bitaro, ndetse nyina akaba ari impumyi, bose akaba
ariwe ubatunze, ko ariko yari azi ko gutwara urwo rumogi ari icyaha gihanirwa n’amategeko, ariko
abikora kubera ibyo bibazo byo mu rugo.
[19] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga imiburanire ya Hategekimana Daniel ku rwego
rw’ubujurire bwa kabiri nk’uko yagaragajwe haruguru, irebewe hamwe n’ibisobanuro yatanze mu
ibazwa rye ku rwego rw’iperereza mu Bugenzacyaha, binahujwe n’umurongo Urukiko
rw’Ikirenga rwafashe ku birebana n’umuburanyi ufite ibyo yemeye mu iperereza yagera mu
Rukiko agahindura imvugo ahakana icyaha, uwo murongo ukaba waranakomeje gukurikizwa
n’uru Rukiko ku manza zisa n’uru, kuba Hategekimana Daniel yiregura avuga ko atari azi ko ibyo
yari atwaye mu gikapu yafatanywe byari urumogi, ko ibyo bigaragaza ko nta n’umugambi yari
afite wo kurugurisha, nta shingiro bifite kuko ubwe mu Bugenzacyaha nk’uko byagaragajwe
haruguru yasobanuye neza uko yakoze icyaha, mu bushishozi n’umutimanama uru Rukiko
ruzisesenguye izo mvugo ze rukaba rubona ko ari iz’ukuri kandi zikwiye kwemerwa
nk’ikimenyetso gihamya ko akora kandi yafatiwe mu bikorwa byo gucuruza urumogi, bityo nta
makosa yakozwe mu kumuhamya icyo cyaha ku buryo yakosorwa, bivuze ko ubujurire bwe nta
shingiro bufite.
[20] Hashingiwe ku byagaragajwe haruguru byose, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ubujurire
bwatanzwe na Hategekimana Daniel nta shingiro bufite, nta n’igihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza
yajuririye.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[21] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Hategekimana Daniel nta shingiro bufite;
[22] Rwemeje ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza n° RPA 01367/2021/HC/KIG rwaciwe
n’Urukiko Rukuru ku wa 14/3/2025;
[23] Rwemeje ko igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni icumi (10.000.000 Frw) yahanishijwe, kigumyeho;
[24] Rutegetse ko amagarama y'urubanza aherera ku Isanduku ya Leta.
keywords: Kuba uregwa yagera imbere y’Urukiko agahindura imvugo
